send_to_cs: Send to CS for legal and fraud related inquires
Send to CS for product safety inquires and threats
Send to CS for website technical issues
escalate: ESC if cx claims bodily injury as result of a product
ESC if cx highlights dangers to health/safety as a result of product
templates: For all post-purchase & warranty inquiries use "SUPPORT" temp (SPT)
For discount code issues use "SUPPORT" temp (SPT)
For product info that you can't find on the site use "SUPPORT" temp (SPT)
If cx reach out about 90 qt cooler recall, use shortcut RCC
For custom order cancellation and edit requests, don't use CED, use the designated templates instead

conversation.message_text: Igloo: Welcome to Igloo! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/sqw
Igloo: Hey this is Sarah, how can I help you?
I have a Playmate with a broken latch. Is the long piece of latch on the interior available
Photo availabe if you need for id.
Igloo: I'm sorry about that. Just to be sure, are you referring to any of these? https://igloo.attn.tv/aqPKn_-NeXpG Also, you can send the picture so we're on the same page. I'll be here.
Hello
Igloo: I'm still here and I'll be expecting the photo.
Template used: "SUPPORT"; last updated: 2025-07-18 13:30:38.321

Igloo: Thank you. The best way to continue help with this request is to text "SUPPORT" and you will be directed to another team member. Please do not send images via text as we cannot view them. In these cases, you may email us directly using customerservice@shop.igloocoolers.com or give us a call at 1-800-273-7024. 

Please note that our team is available Monday - Friday 8:00am - 5:00pm PST.

send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS
tone: Close the convo once the client takes over!

conversation.message_text: Staples.com: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from Staples.com.
Staples.com: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/kBB
Staples.com: Congrats, you're on our list! Here we'll share special offers and new deals, from us to you. Tap here to start shopping: https://staples.attn.tv/l/lJ7/c75N5
Staples.com: Add us in your contacts to get exclusive updates on new products, promos & more. Simply tap on the card & save us as a new contact!
Where is my coupon?
Staples.com: I'm sorry, but I don't see any coupon associated with your account at the moment. If you believe this is an error, please contact our customer service for further assistance.
It said if I sign up for texts and newsletters I would receive a coupon for $15 of a purchase of $60 or more but I have not seen a coupon

Staples.com: I understand you're waiting for a $15 off coupon. Unfortunately, I don't have that specific coupon available. However, I encourage you to check our website, staples.com, for the most current promotions and sales.
So your website lied to me? It

Staples.com: I'm sorry for the inconvenience. Unfortunately, I don't have a $15 off coupon available right now. However, you can use this coupon code 1318733575882908 for your purchase. Please visit staples.com to use it.

send_to_cs: Send to CS immediately for post-purchase issues
Send to CS for payment processing issues
tone: Don't tell customers that we'll be restocking
Close the conversation when a customer responds 'no'
templates: If a cx reaches out regarding the Early Access event, use EAE shortcut
For cx reaching out in Spanish use SSC shortcut
For checkout issues use the "Check out Issues" temp
For store item availability, use SPA shortcut
If cx's email doesn't work for early access, use EEA shortcut
dos_and_donts: They occasionally run sign-up campaigns where cx text certain keywords (“releases,” “early access”) to join a list. If a customer sends a similar keyword:
➜ Check the website banner or landing page to confirm if it's a current keyword trigger
➜ If confirmed, close the convo, if not you can respond
All clothing is true to size unless otherwise stated on the product page
You can use these sizing charts for reference (for internal use only): https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1kmra_vOwCJuHoAx9D4L4Qx95rxafHcrqn-ZGutfzLgg/edit?usp=sharing
🅿️ If customers say they want to purchase in store - encourage them to buy online & pick up in-store
For store info q's (phone number/additional info) - use the store locator with your VPN turned on!
drive_to_purchase: 🅿️ If customers are looking for an outfit recommendation/item pairing - direct them to the "shop the look" section on each product page or use the LK shortcut
